programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Moonlighting
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) gets evicted from his apartment; Regina falls for an author who has a strange fetish.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dont Stand Too Close to Me
programme.desc: Steve leads Reginas teen-feminist discussion group; Cedric and Lovita socialize with another couple.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Wedlocked
programme.desc: On Cedric and Lovitas (Cedric The Entertainer, Terri J. Vaughn) wedding day, Steve (Steve Harvey) and the groom find themselves locked in a basement.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Gigolo
programme.desc: Steve and Regina set each other up with blind dates; Cedrics basketball game rituals drive the others crazy.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - If Cooks Could Kill
programme.desc: Emotions boil over when Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) compete against Regina and Lovita (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Terri J. Vaughn) in a cooking contest.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - I Believe I Can Lie
programme.desc: Steve must break the news to Regina and the students that Michael Jordan canceled as speaker for Entrepreneur Day.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dressed to Chill
programme.desc: Romeo and Bullethead lead a protest against school uniforms after Steve makes a rousing speech about students rights.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Honeymooners
programme.desc: When Cedrics honeymoon plans fall through, he tries to tag along with Steve and the gang on a free trip to Florida.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Childhood Interrupted
programme.desc: Coming of age is not easy.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - One Pot Hits
programme.desc: Yo-Yo cooks with one of her longtime friends, Hip Hop Vinnie Brown; cooking chili with three types of beans; a drink called the one hitter quitter punch, its fruit punch with passion fruit juice, fresh pineapple juice and a tequila twist.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Mama Mia in the House
programme.desc: A cooking lesson that is steeped in family love and tradition; Mama Mia, Yo-Yos mom is in the house, and she is sharing a one-of-a-kind and unique way to lay out meatloaf.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Yo-Yos Quick And Healthy Meals
programme.desc: Quick and healthy meals with a Yo-Yo twist; these healthy meals are all Asian-inspired; we start with a hot and spicy soup that is loaded with vegetables, shrimp, and rice noodles; making an Asian-inspired cabbage slaw with two types of cabbage.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - For Lovers Only
programme.desc: Yo-Yo hops in the kitchen to prepare a special meal for her special guest; she invites her fiance, Kelvin, over to fix one of his favorite meals; its a meal that they both love.

programme.title: Life of a King

programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Love, Rosie (2014)
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex are best friends until Alexs family moves to America. They gamble everything to keep their love and friendship alive over the years and miles.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: The Faculty (1998)
programme.desc: A group of small town High School students, including an introverted photographer and a drug dealer, begin to suspect somethings off with their teachers. They realize that the faculty is under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites.

programme.title: Vindicta (2023)
programme.desc: When a city is terrorized by a sadistic serial killer, a seasoned detective and a newly recruited paramedic are forced into a deadly game of vengeance, only to discover the key to stopping the bloodshed lies in unlocking the truth of their own pasts.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Our Friend (2019)
programme.desc: After Nicole and Matthew receive life-altering news, the couple find unexpected support from their friend Dane, who puts his own life on hold to move into their family home.
